tool_input_preview: {"command":"which fnm || which nvm || which volta || which mise 2>/dev/null; ls ~/.nvm/versions/node/ 2>/dev/null; fnm list 2>/dev/null","description":"Check available Node version managers"}
error:
Exit code 127
fnm not found
nvm () {
	if [ "$#" -lt 1 ]
	then
		nvm --help
		return
	fi
	local DEFAULT_IFS
	DEFAULT_IFS=" $(nvm_echo t | command tr t \\t)
" 
	if [ "${-#*e}" != "$-" ]
	then
		set +e
		local EXIT_CODE
		IFS="${DEFAULT_IFS}" nvm "$@"
		EXIT_CODE="$?" 
		set -e
		return "$EXIT_CODE"
	elif [ "${-#*a}" != "$-" ]
	then
		set +a
		local EXIT_CODE
		IFS="${DEFAULT_IFS}" nvm "$@"
		EXIT_CODE="$?" 
		set -a
		return "$EXIT_CODE"
	elif [ -n "${BASH-}" ] && [ "${-#*E}" != "$-" ]
	then
		set...
